El juego es muy divertido, de verdad cubre un hueco que ningún otro hace, mucho **** en el juego, pero cuando coincides con compañeros que pasan el balón, haces toques rápidos y se mueve el juego, es un gustazo. 
La reseña negativa no es por esos **** no me entendáis mal, con eso se lidia, siguiente partido y ya. La reseña negativa viene por la clara intención de esta compañía con este juego y la falta de resolución de sus problemas, claramente intentan exprimir todo cuanto pueden de el, en el aspecto de llevar ya varios packs de pago y colabs con jugadores profesionales sin haber ni un solo arreglo en un juego ROTO, porque si, e ahi el por que de la reseña, EL JUEGUITO ESTA ROTO COJONES. El desync es el problema principal, es salvaje, totalmente salvaje, me atrevo a decir el mas bestia que he jugado en toda mi vida, y soy un viejo, pasas de haber atajado un balón como portero a que haya entrado, de robar un balón a que lo tenga el rival a 3 metros, es muy salvaje, me atrevería a decir que no se puede jugar a el, si no fuese tan entretenido. Lo que si es injugable evidentemente es a nivel competitivo, el cual podría ser un maravilloso e-sport si no fuese por lo mal que va. Por supuesto ya omito el tema exploits de juego rollo, si entras al menu del juego mientras cargas el disparo se cancela y asi engañas al rival y un larguisimo etc... que hacen que el juego rompa totalmente sus mecánicas base. 

En resumen, menos colabs con marcas, menos paquetitos de pago para sacar pasta a tus jugadores (los cuales estan cayendo en picado porque ven cada vez mas claro cual es el rumbo a tomar) y mas arreglar el juego, que va como la mierda, que ya iba así desde la beta, pero cojones, uno esperaba que cuando saliese estaría UN POCO mejor, pero no.
No lo compren, en cuanto lo compras y lo instalas ya has perdido el partido.

Fun soccer game.  

The word soccer originated in England as a slang abbreviation for association football, the formal name for the sport governed by the Football Association, established in 1863. In the late 19th century, to distinguish between different forms of football—primarily rugby football and association football—students at Oxford University coined nicknames by adding the suffix “-er.” Rugby football became rugger, while association football became assoccer, which was eventually shortened to soccer. Although the term has largely fallen out of use in the United Kingdom, it remains common in countries like the United States, Canada, and Australia, where it helps differentiate association football from other types of football played locally.
Nice <3

Allora... Il gioco ha un gameplay che con gli amici è stra divertente. Sotto un ottica puramente di "intrattenimento" è un ottima opportunità per il vostro gruppetto... Ma se volete puntare al competitivo... Meh...🥲.

I server sono veramente scadenti, durante i match c'è un perenne desync tra i players, e ciò non fa altro che andare a togliere la tempistica dei comandi e predict.

A differenza di Rocket League, la palla ed il corpo del player non sono perennemente ragdoll. Ciò comporta uno strano feeling dove credi di aver colpito o deviato il pallone, ma in realtà in quell'istante (a causa del fatto che non hai attivato la modalità contrasto, o altro simili) il tuo personaggio non ha effettivamente una "hitbox" per poterlo fare.

Spesso capita (a causa del desync, perlomeno in parte) che quando si prova a colpire un pallone conteso da più giocatori e tutti contemporaneamente avviano un'animazione, solo uno (di base il primo che riesce a mandare l'informazione al server) riuscirà a colpire il pallone, e creerà un momento di disagio dove tutti i giocatori subiranno un "animation reset", che rimuove completamente quel feeling di gameplay continuo, dandone una sensazione di gioco molto... Mmh... "cheap". Solitamente questo è un errore commesso nei giochi indie, e considerando il prezzo di Rematch mi aspetto assolutamente di meglio (specialmente in server). Sono problematiche che confido verranno risolte con il passare del tempo, ma allo stato attuale del gioco non saprei se consigliarlo o meno. 

Sono 25€ per un totale di 4 semplici modalità di gioco (2vs2, 3vs3, 4vs4, 5vs5 + modalità allenamento) con feeling incompleto... 

In conclusione... Allo stato attuale del gioco non credo assolutamente valga quello che costa, ciò che ricevi è davvero poco rispetto a ciò che paghi.

Jogo muito bom e extremamente viciante, porém muito cru. Lançaram com vários problemas, promessas não cumpridas e atualizações quase inexistentes. Listarei alguns problemas que encontrei e que estão até agora sem solução:

- O principal de todos, a mira do passe no mouse e teclado. Muito sensível, ocasionando erros frequentes que são extremamente frustrantes. Prometeram um ajuste na sensibilidade ou o retorno da opção de mirar no WASD, mas até agora nada.
- Mecânicas desequilibradas, no ranque alto ou em campeonatos existe somente UMA jogada, o cruzamento direto com voleio. É uma jogada tão forte que deixa o jogo monótono e chato, todo mundo quer fazer, pois é o melhor jeito de marcar um gol. 
- Falta de crossplay com outras plataformas
- Ranqueada sem critério nenhum que mistura pessoas de todos os elos (talvez ocasionada pela falta de players, devido ao problema acima)
- Falta de um modo ranqueado 3x3 ou 4x4, o 5x5 é uma bagunça total, é o modo menos divertido de ser jogado.
- Ausência de uma punição mais severa para jogadores que quitam, que trollam a partida ou que nunca tocam a bola, não tem NADA mais frustrante que isso nesse jogo.
- A prioridade de toque de bola nesse jogo é um mistério, ninguém sabe explicar qual é o critério utilizado para quem vai interceptar ou chutar primeiro, carece de uma explicação mais detalhada sobre isso.
- Mecânicas como goleiro são muito limitadas aqui, não consegue controlar se pula alto ou baixo, as vezes a animação de defesa pareced cancelada se no meio da ação você pula, etc.

Enfim, resumindo, creio que o jogo não vale o preço se botar na balança o estresse que vai passar com ele. Talvez se conseguir amigos para jogar em um time fechado, do contrário, poupe sua saúde mental.

Es una pena, una **** pena, pero claramente la deriva del juego no te da otra opción que valorarlo como negativo, lo explico.

El juego en si es divertidísimo, un fifa street online para unas pachangas con los amigos, freestyle y fantasía pura cuando el juego te deja que lo disfrutes, el problema viene ahí, que el juego no te deja casi nunca que lo disfrutes.
Ha salido hace un mes con muchísimos problemas, DeSync, crasheos random, entrar a partidos empezados y no poder moverte, balón que se pega al suelo cuando hay un choque dividido, celebraciones de gol haciendo todos malditas T Pose, la tienda se rompe sola y tienes que salir y volver a entrar al juego para que se arregle. También quiero añadir que no hay ningún sistema de bloqueo o reportes, si alguien decide no jugar, dejarse meter gol para no ir portero y similares pues todo bien para él.
[b]TODOS ESOS FALLOS YA ESTABAN EN LAS BETAS[/b] y ahí seguían en el lanzamiento oficial, de esto han arreglado solo los crasheos y lo de entrar a partidos empezados sin poder moverte este mes, al menos en mi caso no he tenido más.

Porque soy tan negativo? Porque han sacado el juego con su pase de temporada con solo dinero real y un pack extra de "sé Ronaldinho" con dinero real también, hastá ahí correcto, lícito, lo que no puede ser es que la prioridad haya sido sacar otros 3 packs más (Puma, sé Ter Stegen y sé Mainoo) y los malditos errores sigan ahí, la imagen que da es miedo al futuro cercano del juego, os resumo la experiencia rápidamente de juego ahora mismo.

Entras al juego, invitas a tus amigos si es que tienes y venga, unos partiditos, primera jugada? Bonita, pase, pase, triangulación de la naranja mecánica y golazo, diversión pura.
Siguiente jugada te hacen un tiro el cual literalmente en tu cámara lo has pillado con las manos, hay sonido de hit, puntos por parada o intercepción, vaya que el juego también te dice que lo has hecho, pues no bobo, pillaste, te atraviesa y gol del rival pero no pasa nada, 1-1 todo por jugarse, sacamos de medio y jugadita, te roban el balón pero estás ágil y le entras de nuevo, hit, entrada perfecta de Cannavaro prime, sonido y efecto visual de hit con puntos dados por intercepción, el juego te dice que le has dado, QUE NO IMBÉCIL, haces la entrada y te vas deslizando hasta el botón de salir del juego sin el balón porque el rival sigue con el balón pegado a los pies.
Da igual como hagas, con el desync disfrutarlo es imposible, en cada partido pasarán cosas extrañisimas, repeticiones de jugadas o goles como para que los creadores debieran tener apuro y ganas de arreglarlo.

Si la deriva es seguir con un juego con el desync más bestial que he visto desde un juego de los 2000, adelante, en unos pocos meses el juego morirá como sigan en este rumbo y la compañía está tirando un proyecto de videojuego divertidísimo por pura avaricia de sacar y sacar basura en vez de cuidar su juego y luego exprimirlo si quieren.

This game is infuriating. When it's good, it's really good, when it's bad it makes me want to rip my hair out. Idk who this guy Netcode is but I want him arrested. Just another unfinished game released with a crazy price tag. I played the playtests and the demos and gave this game far too much grace. "It'll be better when it releases." No. It's not. The ball still goes through GK's hands and body, sometimes the ball is untouchable by anybody and we huddle around it begging to touch it or it will teleport across the field, and there is zero sbmm. It has ranks, but they don't matter. If you are in bronze you are going to go up against Elite level players. Frequent disconnects, and if your teammate disconnects then you still lose elo when you lose. I will change my review when they fix the game and make it playable. Honestly regret this purchase.

Great game with amazing core mechanics that needs small quality of life changes to become truly the best soccer game.

I reached elite playing attack and trying out all positions and have quite a few hours in this game. The game starts hard with learning the base ball control mechanics then it feels like it gets easy arround plat-diamond and then at the higher level gets hard again with macro being involved just like in league of legends.

Things I don't like

When players cross the ball and there's multiple people going to defend the guy shooting that recieved the cross sometimes who wins the duel feels like pure rng. And the meta in competitive is boring it is just long crosses and 50/50 hoping you can header the ball away even if it's 2 defenders but somehow the volley gets priority. This feels too random for a game with such competitive potential.

Servers are still lagging the ball sometimes literally teleporting all over the screen

There is no reason you should not be transparent about matchmaking and ranks. I should be able to see my team's rank and the enemy rank. Matchmaking seems to be working when 5 man queuing but solo queue is unplayable especially if you're not defender. If you try to play solo queue asa striker good luck because there will be 2 other ronaldos camping in the enemy box leaving your only option to defend and be an all around player. Perhaps role queue would solve this but I don't see how you coud combat people queuing for a position and not sticking to it. The game is dynamic, positions switch around a bit during game but the core of football is still gk defenders midfielder (argument to be made in this game that mid is not needed with wingers being so powerful) and striker/s

Why is my pitch always changing ? That's not very competitive. You should be able to switch to a high visibility pitch that doesnt change for ranked queue.

We need a match history and replay system. ! ! ! !

All elite keepers I hear they always complain about ball priority and I've seen videos of people catching the ball but somehow the enemy still scores. Too much rng. It is not enjoyable for keepers

Small quality of life

Let me be able to open the menu any time please
Why is menu lagging for such a nice game


Things I like

Crashes seem fixed
Amazing game development just wow really
When this game works well and you have a good team 10/10 experience
Good interface easy to use nice customization 
Great mechanics. Please keep the mechanics in the game that are counterable and fair. Iffy slide is not broken if you hold a person back and dont instantly tackle you can predict their movement or if you dont want to risk it you hold him back and close his space off. thats a fair mechanic. Blade shoot is not broken, it is not realistic but a good keeper will save a good blade shoot. People who mastered all mechanics and are high rank should be able to completely dominate low rank people, like in any competitive game. Fixing matchmaking and solo queue providing a better environment for players to climb that don't necessarly want to play with a team. Report system. You sometimes get people owngoaling and throwing games away.

I rated it positive because it is a great game and all the 'negative' points are meant as constructive criticism. This is a great game but with a bit more work and open mind listening to the community, both casual players, ranked players low and high rank

If you are reading this review tl;dr just get the game

Le concept est vraiment très sympa et bien pensé pour adapter le foot à 5. Pas énormément de contenu mais bon c'est pas ce qu'on cherche dans ce genre de jeu

Pour le reste, ça mérite d'être peaufiné avant de pouvoir jouer sérieusement en classé (solo) :
* le netcode est à chier
* les communications ne permettent pas de tactique (spam de "I got it" ; "backpost!", on en peut plus)
* le matchmaking donne l'impression qu'on est 15 sur le serveur Europe
* mérite aussi des optimisations par ci, par là (stutter fréquents, etc)
* la physique et les contacts sont souvent à chier, la plupart des gestes techniques sont un lancé de dés
* spam de mécaniques vraiment pas dingues pour la beauté des actions (dribble en hauteur en boucle, passe sur le mur arrière, affichage du point d'atterrissage de la balle, etc.)

Au global sympa mais je conseille d'attendre quelques mises à jour correctives avant de se lancer

Начну с того, что в целом, игра нормальная, точнее её задумка, идея, но если задавать вопрос таким образом - рекомендую ли я игру или не рекомендую, то однозначно ответ - нет.

В игре плохие несчитываемые анимации, игрок владеет низким уровнем микроконтроля персонажа, игра буквально сама при нажатии определенных команд управления выбирает, что будет делать, из-за чего скиллозависимость под большим вопросом, тем, у кого хватит азарта играть в неё в соревновательном режиме откровенно сочувствую. В целом игра устроена так, что действие станет напоминать футбол, только в случае если ты играешь со своими друзьями, либо с адекватными рандомами, вероятность чего достаточно мала, но это стандартная проблема, нет смысла на этом делать упор.

Оптимизация ужасная, ни одна игра не вылетает с такой частотой, как эта, причем то с ошибкой, то без.
Где-то 1/4 часть ачивок забагована, они либо выдаются неверно, либо вообще не выпадают, хотя условия соблюдены уже сотни раз.

Цвета экипировки, которые ты задаешь будут отличаться в меню и в матче - в меню условно ты поставил красный цвет бутс, а в матче они станут розовыми.

И так во всем и везде, абсолютно в каждом аспекте игры ты натыкаешься на недоработки, либо на баги. Если же говорить про ядро игры, отбросить все технические проблемы, то игра больше про "футбольную эстетику", чем про сам футбол. Какой-то симуляции футбола тут не ждите, даже Рокет Лига будет к этому ближе.

Думайте сами, решайте сами.
Мой совет - играйте только с друзьями и только "под пиво", иначе маловероятно, что вы сможете получить удовольствие.

Game is very fun and addictive as hell. But.. netcode of this game is a joke. Games are pretty much decided based on which team gets more griefed by the game itself. I don't recommend it until its fixed.

No matchmaking (you get matched with bottom rank and top rank players in ranked no matter what your rank is), very bad networking, horrible servers unless you're in France or US. The devs are not present, just printing very low effort micro-transaction content instead of making any positive changes for the game. 

The base game is fun enough but the above issues make it extremely frustrating to play. Get a premade lobby of 5, move to the US, or wait for the devs to fix all of the above (might have to wait a while).

EDIT: Every patch actually makes the game (both netcode and gameplay) worse, no joke. I'm happy I got to play the game while it was still somewhat playable I guess, but I'm sad I gave money to the worst devs I've seen in a while

我一般不评价游戏。但这个游戏让我花点时间写下这些

这个游戏是团队游戏，也有体力限制，多传球才是正道！

Man oh man..Rematch is the football game for people who are tired of bloated, overpriced annual releases and just want pure, raw, competitive football. No microtransaction nonsense. No Ultimate Team drama. Just you, your mates, and the ball.

The gameplay feels tight and responsive, with a focus on fast rematches and tight scorelines. It’s less about flashy tricks and more about positioning, timing, and smart passing, like the street football version of chess.

Matches are short and intense. You win? Your opponent slams the rematch button. You lose? You do the same. It's a beautiful cycle of rivalry, revenge, and last-second screamers.

The art style is minimal but clean, and the animations feel surprisingly satisfying. The game's simplicity is its biggest strength, it strips football down to what makes it addictive in the first place.

Pros:
✔️ Instant rematches = pure dopamine
✔️ Great couch or online competition
✔️ Zero fluff, just football
✔️ No pay-to-win. Skill matters.

Cons:
❌ No big licenses or real teams (but do you really need them?)
❌ Not much for solo players—this is meant for versus play
❌ Prepare to lose friends (in a good way)

Final Verdict:
Rematch isn't trying to be FIFA or PES. It's trying to be better at the one thing that matters: making you say “one more game” until it’s 3 AM.
9/10 – Best enjoyed with a friend you don’t mind losing to (or beating repeatedly).

Игра крутая, но качество соединения плохое, играть невозможно. Не рекоммендую к покупке до тех пор, пока не исправят эту проблему.

Невероятный потенциал в корне разбивается об лаги - отбил/не отбил мяч на воротах - это целая рулетка - то мяч буквально через половину ворот примагничивается к рукам вратаря, то пролетает в сантиметре от этих самых рук и попадает в ворота, афк (в каждой второй игре отваливается/ливает минимум 1 человек), отсутствие системы репортов - когда твой вратарь спокойно выбегает из ворот каждую свою очередь и оставляет их пустыми, а ты не можешь его наказать вообще никак. Зато есть большой каталог внутриигровой косметики - хочешь покупай за внутреннюю валюту, хочешь - покупай за реал. Сразу видны приоритеты, что сказать.
Игра была бы отличной, если бы разработчики поставили в приоритет ее техническое состояние. Сейчас в это играть попросту тяжело. Первая пара часов - глоток свежего воздуха, а потом ты видишь что игра 1 против 4 - это не случайное совпадение, а довольно частая ситуация, где у тебя игра изначально начинается 3 против 4, т.к. одного человека не нашли и еще двое отключаются т.к. в неравной игре ловить нечего.
Отдельно хочу отметить окно итогов матча. есть 3 окна, между которыми можно переключаться. Сами итоги (итоговое количество очков, пасы голевые, голы, сейвы и т.п.) расположены в последнем. И в ранкеде, раз в несколько секунд тебя возвращает на окно твоего рейтинга (сколько очков ранкеда заработал и сколько осталось до повышения). Что бы ты ни хотел посмотреть - тебя всё равно перекинет на наименее информативное окно через несколько секунд.

Rematch starts strong, but it quickly loses its appeal due to poor support and frustrating issues.

Lack of Fixes – Nearly a month post-launch and we've had no meaningful updates. One so-called “fix” was released, but it didn’t resolve any of the core problems.

Prioritizing Monetization Over Quality – The developers seem more interested in selling skins than addressing gameplay issues. But they can't even get the skins right, for example, there's a shirt in the shop that causes a visual glitch where part of your character’s body disappears when paired with certain pants.

Broken – The game is plagued with bugs: the ball frequently gets stuck, lag is common, animation priority disrupts gameplay, and exploits exist. Worst of all, there’s no proper way to report people.

Repetitive and Stale – After around 40 hours, with no proper new content or gameplay improvements, the game starts to feel boring and repetitive.

Indie devs using the same disgusting practices like huge publishers (EA, Ubi, etc.).

You basically have to pay between 30 an 50 bucks to get a single barebones playing mode, which should be 10 bucks max. The most horrible greedy choice: Asking a lot of money for a simple game mode AND also including a disgusting FOMO shop to spend real money on, like it would be F2P. So there goes the entire progression system to get meaningful cosmetics through gameplay.

Ranked only works for 5v5, which is mostly complete chaos with too many players on a small map. Especially considering that most players don't make any passes. So no ranked for 3v3 and 4v4 if you'd prefer those modes and still like to have a ranking system. Ok if you prefer 5v5. Bad for everyone else.

Future updates: This game doesn't even feel like a complete game, but costs as much as if it would. When checking for what's to come next, you'll be confronted with a whole lotta nothing. Additionally to this, they ask you to be patient because they're a small team and to not expect the updates this year. But still they're asking lots of money for this. They're working on crossplay, which should've been available at launch. Also other small tweaks that wouldn't be necessary to work on if the game would've be finished at release. Nothing about adding ranked to other games modes or any other interesting addition.

It blows my mind how games like these can get a "mostly positive" on Steam. I suppose that greedy publishers like EA already did a good job getting a big part of the gamers used to getting f*** in the a**. Except if you'd like to get f*** in the a**. Then they don't.

While I do like the game, there are important issues to be aware of.

The game and its concept are great, and if you play with friends or teammates who like to stick together, it’s just the perfect mix of competitive while also being a good casual game to turn on to decompress (or not, depending on how easily you get tilted).

There are two minor problems and one major issue I feel the need to point out. The first minor is that, at the time I’m writing this review, there’s no crossplay between Steam and other platforms (like Xbox/Game Pass, PSN). They’ve announced it’s on the way. The second minor issue is there’s no key remapping, so you’re stuck with the current setup, also in the roadmap.

The major one is either the "priority" system or outright netcode issues. I’ve had multiple games where actions and their consequences aren’t consistent. If I’m defending and I’m in front of an attacker, even if I play the animation, the attacker has "priority," while in other cases it’s reversed. It’s getting frustrating how inconsistent it is, turning every match into a gamble.

It’s a bit disappointing that, less than a month after release, the only updates have been cosmetic bundles (5 x €10 each), especially given the technical issues still present. I get that it’s early, but it’s frustrating to see cosmetics prioritized over core fixes this soon.

キャラステータス無し、スキル無し、ロール無し。
全て己の実力のみで勝負するストイックなゲーム性。
サッカーモチーフの新しい対戦ゲームといった趣で最高に面白い。
面倒なルール無し。1試合6分と短く気軽に遊べるのも良い。

最初はファウル無しの無法乱闘に少林サッカーじゃんｗｗとキャッキャするが、理解が進むほどに、これ…スライディングした奴から負けていく！と気づく。
格ゲーの様に択の読み合いと間合いが重要で、対面でたった1ステップ余計な事をするだけで足をすくわれるシビアさに上達欲が⁠燃え上がる。
複雑なコマンドは求められず、高い状況把握能力と創造性がものをいうのが良い塩梅。

心底面白いですが、シンプル故にやればやるほど粗が気になってくる。
英雄はいらないチームゲーであり、メンタルゲー。
それなのに[b]バグ、ラグ、民度[/b]が心をかき乱してきます。


[h3]発売当初のマッチング問題[/h3]
これは[u]完全に解消されました[/u]。ランクマでも5秒、長くても5分待てば始まります。
ただしスピード重視のヤケクソ調整で同じ人と何連続も当たります。同じメンツでチームシャッフルして連戦するので地元のコートでやってんのかよと笑えて来る。そのうち人読み出来る程に顔馴染みが並びます。

[h3]ラグ[/h3]
ボールを取り合う対戦ゲームなので当然ラグが面白さに直結します。
初期と比べ圧倒的にマシになったものの、アジアサーバー固定でも10ms～60msと開きがあって安定しません。

他人のリプレイを見ていても、今の球キャッチできてたよね…？と納得できない時もある。
通信環境によってボールの挙動が変わるので、練習では出来るシュートが対戦では披露出来ない事もしばしば。そこに煽りの追い打ちは心が折れる。だから俺はお前を責めない。

おまえの苦労をずっと見てたぞ。本当によく頑張ったな？遂に我慢が報われ莫大なナイス！を得る。そこで折れてしまえばこれまでの苦労は全て水の泡だ。(後方GK目線)

[h3]バグ[/h3]
基本的なゲームが成立する程度には土台はしっかりできています。
では何かと言えば、メンタルに影響を及ぼします。
細かいバグが超大量にあるのが遅効性の毒の様にじわじわ効いてくる。
キャラクリが反映されない。Tスタンスでぼっ立ちする。勝手にVCがオンになる。連戦するとストアが使えなくなる。収入源のバトルパスすらまともに機能してなかった時はこのゲームを続けて大丈夫なのかと不安になった。

そんな積み重ねがあるので、トラップやセーブに失敗した時に、これバグでしょと情けない懐疑心が脳裏をかすめる。俺は悪く無い！と内なるガキが喚く。ほんとは分かってるので勇気を出して「ごめん」を押す。

でもREMATCHが悪いんだよ。至る所で技術力の低さが目につく。
マッチ待機中もGPU爆熱大回転なのはやめて欲しい。今年の夏は暑いから。
PADのキーコンフィグが[strike]未だにない[/strike]。個別ミュート機能は対戦において必須だろ。クロスプレイを早くしてくれ。サッカー好きの陽キャは皆プレステなんだ。

[h3]民度[/h3]
味方がミスるとナイス！の連呼。2点リードされるだけで試合放棄。優勢でも気に食わなければ⁠利敵行為と途中抜け。VCで公然と味方批判。
スポーツマンシップの欠片も無いキッズの巣窟です。
ゲーム内の通報とブロックは押してもSteamプロフィールが開くだけで機能していません。そのせいでトロールは非公開アニメアイコンが多いといういらない傾向に気づいてしまった事にすら嫌気が差す。
コミュニティによってゲームが死ぬのは、かつて愛したオメガストライカーズの悲しき末路でもう沢山なので、同じ轍を踏む前に早急に何とかして欲しい。[b]これが一番言いたい。[/b]


一応トキシックはランクを上げれば自ずと減ったので頑張ろう。
ゴールドは煽りがデフォルトの他責の魔境。
ダイヤも稀に自信過剰なバケモンがプロの顔つきで袖手傍観している。
マスター帯になって初めて害悪プレイヤー皆無な平穏な環境に辿り着きました。──言っとくが俺はソロだ。心の弱えやつは桃色の桃源郷を目指せ。

パスしろよ！は未だにあるけど最後まで諦めないだけでもゲームになる。
タイムアップ寸前の逆転劇を見てきた者達だ。面構えが違う。
しかしながら優しいというよりは悟りの境地の様な殺伐とした空気でただただ無言で試合が進み息苦しい。みんな技量があるのでいつ首根っこを掴まれるかと相互監視の猜疑心に陥る。超人達の天下一武道会を目指していたのに、相手のミスを容赦なく突く陰湿デスゲームが待っていた。
QBKすると誰も何も言わないが俺にフィールドに立つ資格はあるのかと不安になる。あれ…スライディングでキャッキャしてた時の方がサッカーって楽しかった……。


しかし練習したテクニックで翻弄してシュートを決めた時の快感は何物にも代えがたい。連発神セーブはまさに守護神の心境に至り誇らしい。うめー奴らと華麗なパスワークが決まった時は魂の共鳴を感じて心が震える。やっぱりこのゲームは楽しい！

人口が命なので流行って欲しい。世界じゃ爆売れでも日本人は少ない気がする。
新キャラも新マップも望めないシンプルさ故にテコ入れは難しい。
愛想を尽かされたら終わりなので開発には頑張って欲しい。
最後に、みんな優しくなろう。

the fundamentals are there, but as an online-only game I can't recommend for Australian-based players for several reasons. I haven't had an easy time finding games on weekdays recently, culminating in not being able to find anything on a Sunday after 20 minutes queuing across ranked and quick play modes. 

1) Lack of multi-queue - this causes a divided playerbase
2) No queue times on game modes - another missing feature that would help players find games. 
3) Lack of cross play - this is a huge issue, fragmenting players between various platforms. 

I think with updates these things can be remedied, but my concern would be that it'll come too late for the Australian region. Players will move on to other games and it'll be dead.

Vamos lá, desde que comprei o jogo me surpreendi pois é realmente divertido, porém eu acho que ele não vale nem de longe os 90 reais que ele custa, se for comprar (a menos que seja para jogar com amigos), aconselho comprar em alguma oferta. O jogo tem erros em coisas muito básicas: 

-Você não pode mutar UMA pessoa da equipe, então se cair com aquele cara chato que não para de xingar, ou você muta ele e todo mundo ou é obrigado a ficar ouvindo ele para conseguir ouvir o resto do time também.

- O jogo ele não te da a opção de mexer no volume do microfone dos colegas (não consigo aumentar nem diminuir a voz de alguém específico. 

- Não te da a opção de sensibilidade dos chutes/passes no mouse, você só consegue mexer na sensibilidade da câmera, mas não na sensibilidade de pressionar o botão e ``apontar´´ o mouse, oque resulta em alguns passes para trás e coisas assim 

- E de longe para mim a pior coisa de todas: o jogo não tem requerimento mínimo de lvl ou de qualquer coisa para você puxar uma partida rankeada. Acabei de jogar uma partida ranked que  havia eu, 3 caras que estavam juntos e um outro também jogando sozinho. Desses 3 amigos que estavam juntos, 2 deles falaram no proprio microfone que acabaram de sair do TUTORIAL do jogo. Obviamente, levamos uma surra pois 2 jogadores do time não sabiam nem como andar ou tocar a bola.     

- O jogo não tem sistema de report, ou seja se cair com aquele amiguinho que você leva 1 gol, e ele fica parado o resto do jogo ou fazendo gol contra de propósito, foda-se. Não vai acontecer nada com ele, e você não pode fazer nada.

CONCLUSÃO: É um jogo ruim? Não, de maneira nenhuma. Mas é um jogo muito cru para o seu preço de quase 100 reais, a menos que queira pagar o preço cheio para jogar com amigos sem pretenção nenhuma e se divertir, não recomendo, pois o minímo que espero de um jogo com esse preço, é que na hora da ranked eu caia com um cara que não tenha acabado de aprender como andar no WASD. Pode valer a pena no futuro e tem grande potencial, mas por enquanto, muito a desejar.

В 50% случаев твой скилл в игре ничего не решает. У кого сервер решил по неведомой причине регнуть удар - тот мяч и забрал. И так в этой игре работает абсолютно всё.
Куча багов, отвратительная работа серверов и отсутствие БАЗОВЫХ вещей для онлайн игры по типу системы репортов - заставляют дропнуть игру до лучших времён, которые судя по всему и не наступят, ведь разработчикам важнее добавить коллабу с пумой и очередной скинчик футболиста, нежели прислушаться к игрокам и улучшить свой продукт.

С таким подходом надеюсь эта игра побыстрее загнётся.

Как и во всех играх матчемейкингах рейтинг сломан. Есть несколько причин в этом: 1 причина, потому что челов бустят в пати, потом они играют не на свой ранг. 2 причина я апнул самый высший ранг в этой игре в соло с рандомами без пати, через пот, терпения и труд. Получил ли я какой-то профит с этого? Нет! Я по прежнему регают игру в соло и мне попадаются рандомы после разговоров я узнаю их реальный ранг и вы будете в шоке. Мне кидало всех подряд. То есть от твоего рейтинга вообще ничего не зависит, тебе будут кидать и новичков с 10 уровнем и бронзу и т.д. Хоть у тебя и хай птс в этой игре. Я миллион раз предлагал сделать 2 разных рейтинга - 1 СОЛО РЕЙТИНГ, 2 пати рейтинг и не будет такого бардака как сейчас. В данный момент играть не возможно, но надеюсь игра улучшится. И вопрос рекомендуете ли вы эту игру? А где средний вариант? Сейчас - НЕТ! В будущем возможно ДА! Но это все зависит от разработчиков когда починят матчмейкинг, даже если его починят, то я сомневаюсь что сделают 2 рейтинга - СОЛО рейтинг и ПАТИ рейтинг. Это проблема всех игр и когда-то в светлые времена доты было это. Где соло игроки поднимали свой рейтинг свои цифры самостоятельно! А не как сейчас каждый второй бущеный в пати. Рематч та же помойка. Я наверное лучший в этой игре потмоу что я апнул самый высший ранг в этой игре без пати. 99% апнули в пати. И я знаю о чем я говорю

ReMatch è, senza troppi giri di parole, uno dei giochi più divertenti che abbia mai provato se giocato con 5 amici. 
Tra urla, risate, esultanze, bestemmie e momenti unici. Anche se non sei un fan del calcio o dei giochi calcistici, fidati che ti diverti lo stesso.

È un calcio arcade frenetico, spettacolare e super accessibile(Ricorda i vecchi Fifa Street), dove puoi fare rovesciate in aria, passaggi al volo e gol assurdi, tutto in partite 3v3, 4v4 o 5v5. È totalmente skill-based: nessun pay-to-win, tutto grindabile (Tranne le Collaborazioni), e ogni giocatore ha le stesse possibilità di brillare.

Detto ciò, non è un gioco perfetto anzi:

La community è un tasto dolente: se giochi da solo, preparati a compagni convinti di essere Messi, che non passano mai la palla(A volte me compreso).

I passaggi sono imprecisi: anche dopo ore capisci che devi anticipare l’errore del gioco per farli funzionare.

Il ruolo del portiere è frustrante: tra lag, tuffi non registrati e tiri impossibili da parare.(Anche se da molte soddisfazioni)

I comandi non si possono cambiare, e alcune configurazioni sono veramente scomode.(Anche se prendi l'abitudine)

Difendere è tosta: i dribbling sono troppo efficaci, e i contrasti spesso non funzionano come dovrebbero.

In breve: se giochi da solo, potresti anche odiarlo. Ma se riesci a organizzare un team con amici, ReMatch diventa un’esperienza SPETTACOLARE. Serve qualche miglioramento qua e là, ma il potenziale c’è tutto. E con l’arrivo del crossplay, potrebbe solo migliorare.

Ho piena fiducia negli sviluppatori e sono sicuro che con il tempo sapranno migliorare ogni aspetto del gioco. Nel frattempo cercate di non insultare troppa gente online

The gameplay is perfect and a lot of fun, but the netcode is insanely bad, both the ball and players teleport unpredictably. If your opponent has a lower ping than you, it’s virtually impossible to outplay them: they’ll suddenly warp to your feet and steal the ball. A constant ping above 50 ms is extremely frustrating.

Rather than fixing these issues, the developers keep adding paid skins, which feels like a spit in the face. The ranked system is also flawed: once you hit a certain rank threshold, you can’t be deranked, so it becomes nothing more than a grind. As a result, less-skilled players can grind their way up and end up matched against truly good opponents.

[h3]Short Pros and Cons:[/h3]
Pros:
[list]
	[*]Addictive gameplay
	[*]Fresh concept with a completely new experience
	[*]Genuinely fun and engaging
[/list]
Cons:
[list]
	[*]Tons of bugs
	[*]Netcode is [b]REALLY[/b] bad
	[*]Constant desync issues
	[*]Microtransactions priced the same as the game itself
	[*]No crossplay
	[*]No match history, no demo system, no leaderboards
[/list]


[hr][/hr]
It’s been nearly a month since release, and unfortunately, many issues from the beta are still present:
[list]
	[*]Frequent crashes
	[*]Server instability
	[*]Netcode and sync problems
[/list]


If you check the News section, you’ll see a lot of patch notes and fixes being rolled out. But once you start playing, it becomes clear that many of these bugs aren't actually resolved.


Instead of focusing on the critical issues that affect core gameplay, the devs seem to be addressing minor, low-priority problems. (Yes, they do fix real issues too, but the amount of small, arguably irrelevant fixes is hard to ignore.)


Some recent examples:
[list]
	[*]Fixed the displayed price in the in-game store for Japanese & Vietnamese users
	[*]Fixed an issue where the Terms of Service were not displayed correctly in languages other than English.
	[*]Fixed price display in Korean.
	[*]Fixed a bug where players could not reconnect after hardware was put in sleep mode (how common is this case, really?)
	[*]Fixed camera jitter during goal replays
[/list]




Sure, a major patch is planned soon, and that might change everything and I genuinely hope it does.


But here’s the frustrating part:
During this entire month, while hotfixes were being pushed, a [b]ton[/b] of microtransactions were also added to a game you already had to pay for. I get that these were likely planned long before release, but from a player’s perspective, it’s frustrating.


You pay for a game, you run into game-breaking bugs, and instead of meaningful fixes, you're offered new skins (often priced as much as the game itself) with no way to earn them through gameplay.


That said, the game itself is still great. The core gameplay is incredibly fun and unique, and I’ll definitely keep playing.
But until the critical issues are fixed, I’ll be leaving a negative review.

When the servers don't have any issues, Rematch is probably one of the best games I played this year and have a lot of fun playing both solo and with friends but at the current state I don't recommend buying it unless you are willing to bypass the negatives aspect the game has right now (99% of the reason is the server issues).

Positives:
+ Gameplay is extremely fun, it still has room for improvements.
+ You can play 3v3, 4v4, 5v5 (ranked is only 5v5 at the moment).
+ Art style and sound effects are really good.
+ Matches last 6 minutes (it can go to overtime which is the first team scoring wins) or the first team having a difference of 4 goals in favor wins. This means matches doesn't last too long and you can queue up for the next one pretty quick.

Negatives:
- Server issues: The number one priority Rematch needs to solve. I tried playing both on Auto and South America since I'm from that region, one match I have 30-40ms and everything works like a charm. The next one I have 150-180ms playing with and against the SAME players from the previous lobby and I can see people teleporting while dribbling or when they shoot, the desync of both the ball and your screen since from you POV you did a pass forward and looks fine while in reality due to the connection you stayed there doing nothing or took too long. You might think it's not that bad but after a few days of playing, 1 or 2 games everything works fine and then 6 or 7 games straight where you don't understand anything happening then it will change your mind if it's worth continue to play and call it a day.
- Basic things like cancel the queue sometimes work but most of the time it doesn't.
- Ranked state: it's simply a bit more serious 5v5 quickmatch right now, you can't demote from Gold to Silver for example but you can still demote from tiers inside the division (Gold 1 to 2). Also the matchmaking is not restricted, you can party or be matched with any division (being Elite the highest "elo" you can and will face players in gold or silver).


Conclusion: Pretty sure Sloclap will fix everything in the future but at the current state I cannot recommend this game mainly due to the server issues. Once the server issues get fix and I see a few more aspects being polished and get improvements, I will change my review.

Edit (7/18/2025): Added a few points after playing more and reaching Master div.
Edit (9/5/2025): Crossplay and report system was added

No voy a explicar de que va este juego porque es evidente, así que voy a dividir esta reseña en pros y contras y así os pondré más sencillo decidir si comprarlo.

[u]Pros: [/u]

- Su fisicidad: los controles, más parecidos a un RPG de acción que a un juego de deporte, te hacen sentir mucho más en control del personaje, algo que hace que tus habilidades cuenten mucho más ya que aquí no será automático ni correr con el balón en los pies.
- Es muy adictivo: incluso si no eres un jugador que se pique en los juegos este juego te hará gritar, sufrir, maldecir a tus compañeros y darle a iniciar matchmaking igualmente porque hasta perdiendo vas a disfrutarlo.
- La personalización: podrás crearte hasta tres personajes de lo más variopintos para jugar con ellos algo que hace que cada partido sea único, y creéme que agradecerás cuando veas aparecer en tu equipo a un jugador medio desnudo y con las pintas más ridículas que puedas tener, ese es un verdadero pro.
- Su sistema de monetización: a pesar de tener micropagos y un pase de batalla premium no es nada agresivo, la mitad del pase de batalla es gratuito y además te regalan monedas de pago en el mismo solamente por jugar.

[u]Contras: [/u]

- Bugs y lag: a pesar de tener ya varias semanas sigue teniendo problemas, balones que se vuelven intangibles, personas que se teletransportan, aunque es muy menos que en su salida donde tener dos o tres crasheos cada vez que jugabas era lo normal, aunque no suelen ser problemas que te cabreen o no te dejen disfrutar del juego. Además algunos logros del juego están bug y no sé como algunos los tienen porque son imposibles de conseguir.
- Pocos elementos de personalización: en su salida hubo muy pocos elementos de personalización, aunque van metiendo más en actualizaciones gratuitas y todos son comprables con monedas del juego aún está muy falto de ello, se nota que el tema del online y los bugs y el lag no dejaron tiempo para desarrollar más este aspecto, por lo que pienso que el juego debió haberse retrasado.
- Su comunidad: hay muchísima gente que es completamente inútil y además gilipollas, que tienen nombres como "play pass or go AFK" y que literalmente se quedan parados al lado del portero rival, no hacen nada en todo el partido y tienen el mental tan delicado que como os metan un gol va a intentar meterse en propia todo el rato para que termine el partido. Hay mucha gente que ha llegado a este juego desde el más puro mainstream, que no juega videojuegos de verdad, solo el Fifa y el CoD y que demuestran que no saben tocar un mando sin cagarse encima en cada partido, algo que resulta muy frustrante incluso en rangos altos jugando ranked, ya que estoy convencido de que el matchmaking te empareja igual seas plata, platino o sea tu primer partido.
- El nombre: cómo le llamas Rematch a este juego existiendo la posibilidad de llamarlo Fifu, tuvieron miedo al éxito.

En resumen: a pesar de parecer que cuenta con más contras que pros, o que los contras son muy fuertes, la mayoría de estos no suponen un problema grave para el juego y los que más afectan no son culpa del mismo si no de la gente que juega. De igual manera los pros del juego, sobretodo el más simple, lo disfrutable que es mecánicamente, son tan potentes que merece la pena aguantar a un par de compañeros con déficit de atención y las manos de un gorrino con tal de sentir la emoción y la epicidad que aporta realizar algunas jugadas. Se lo recomiendo a todo el mundo pero, de verdad, si son muy malos no jueguen ranked, jugad partidos normales hasta que aprendáis a coger el mando sin que se os caiga al intentar darle a alguno de los gatillos.

When Rematch is running smoothly, it’s honestly the best sports game I’ve ever played. The gameplay feels fluid, reactive, and most importantly skill-based. No pay to win garbage here, just pure competitive fun. It captures that sports vibe really well but adds its own little twist that keeps matches intense and unpredictable.

That said, it's definitely still rough around the edges. There are bugs, network issues, and some balance problems that really need fixing. A few exploits are still being abused stuff like teleporting to the ball or weird stamina glitches that kinda break the fairness of the game. But from what I’ve seen, the devs are active and patching things fast, so I’ve got hope they’ll clean things up soon.

I’ve seen a lot of players online talking about the same stuff bugs, broken matchmaking, goal kick-off glitches, or matches crashing after celebrations. It’s a bit frustrating, but the community seems to love the core gameplay, just like I do. Everyone’s just hoping the devs keep up the momentum and don’t let the hype fizzle out.

I also really hope they add more (free) cosmetics and give us more customization sliders for avatars feels a bit limited right now, and the game could use that extra personality boost.

Bottom line: Rematch has huge potential. If they keep fixing the issues and add a few more features, this game could absolutely become a staple in the sports gaming scene.

Игра новинка после футбольных симуляторов которые выпускают каждый год без новых идей, но есть проблемы:
1. Сервера и регистрация действий. Было много моментов когда игра не засчитывала отборы или сейфы за вратаря. За кипера очень тяжело играть из-за этого.
2. Отсутствие системы наказания за грифинг или за афк. Очень часто в команду с тобой попадаются неадекватные игроки которые, либо не играют в команде (не дают пасы, выбегают за вратаря и теряют мяч), либо которые намерено мешают игре (блокируют удары своей команды или бьют по своим воротам)
3. Баги. Те кто играл меня поймут ведь их в игре много.
4. Непонятная политика по развитию. Разработчики вместо того чтобы выпускать большое количество хот фиксов занимаются жесткой монетизацией за счёт платных наборов косметики в игре которая и так стоит $29.99. Да они выпускают некоторые фиксы, но проблемы пункта 1 и 3 это не решает вообще.
5. Управление на клавиатуре и мыше. Огромная проблема в передачей пасов и перебросов (X, F, RMB) в данный момент очень тяжело давать диагональные передачи и перебросы потому что от маленького движения мышей они улетают в "небеса".
Итог по игре такой:
Rematch имеет все шансы стать чем то в сравни с Rocket League если разработчики в срочно порядке решат основные проблемы которые я указал выше как человек который наиграл в игру почти 100 часов. 
4/10 в данном состоянии не рекомендуется к покупке.
(The game is new after football simulators that are released every year without new ideas, but there are problems:
1. Servers and registration of actions. There were many moments when the game did not count the tackles or safeties for the goalkeeper. It is very difficult to play for the goalkeeper because of this.
2. The absence of a punishment system for griefing or AFK. Very often, inadequate players are on your team who either do not play as a team (they do not pass, run out behind the goalkeeper and lose the ball), or who deliberately interfere with the game (block their team's shots or shoot at their own goal)
3. Bugs. Those who played will understand me, because there are many of them in the game.
4. Incomprehensible development policy. Instead of releasing a large number of hot fixes, the developers are engaged in hard monetization through paid cosmetic sets in the game, which already costs $29.99. Yes, they release some fixes, but this does not solve the problems of points 1 and 3 at all.
5. Keyboard and mouse controls. A huge problem with passing and throwing (X, F, RMB) at the moment it is very difficult to give diagonal passes and throws because from a small mouse movement they fly into the "sky".
The bottom line on the game is this:
Rematch has every chance of becoming something comparable to Rocket League if the developers urgently solve the main problems that I mentioned above as a person who played the game for almost 100 hours. 
4/10 in this condition it is not recommended for purchase.)

This game instantly caught my attention once I saw that it was made by the fellas who created SIFU.

I do like a vibrant art style, sports, and the dopamine rush of beating a human being in a multiplayer game, so I gave it a try and i'm definitely surprised at how much I love the game. The first 3 matches I felt like maybe it was a bad idea buying this game, mostly because i was absolute buns but once you know the controls, the mechanics and even just rainbow flicking over your opponent it gets so fun. 

I also love how positive the community is compared to FIFA/EAFC. I'm dropping a stinker in game and my teammates would instantly say "we got this" even when they get on the mic they're just so positive its like i'm in an alternate universe.

My complaints are that achievements are very bugged. Also, the lag/sync is so bad sometimes when people shoot whether its my opponents or my teammates, it looks like they're about to justifiably score as the keeper isn't no way near yet they get the save at the last millisecond without diving. Also the ball would get "stuck" as in the game makes it seems as if the ball is free to run up to by anyone but then two seconds later the opponent is somehow near your box and is about to score a banger. 

I'm looking forward to the 2v2 and 1v1 gamemodes if that ever happens, maybe even a "basketball" mode, I don't know maybe I'm getting way to ahead of myself. The game doesn't get old and I don't know how. I'm tired of FIFA/EAFC after 3 games but here I can go for hours, maybe because there's no script here.

Cheers!

This game scratches the same competitive itch as rocket league but less chaotic and more focus on teamwork. Sounds great on paper, but right now the game is plagued with bugs, desync, lag, and simply being unable to connect to a match at all after an hour of queuing. Fundamental issues for a multiplayer game, which should have been ready for launch, not still broken a month after launch.

The problems are compounded by not having any bots to fill out matches, so even when it works you can get ranked matches where players leave or get disconnected and end up with 5v4 or worse imbalancing which still count towards a loss. Game needs a month or two major patches, not hotfixes to iron out these issues and then it will likely be a ton of fun. But it's not fun now

Es macht an sich sehr viel Spaß. Es gibt jedoch ein paar Punkte die so gravierend sind, die den Spielspaß hart zerstören. 
1. Bugs und glitches. Diese halten sich aber in grenzen.
2. Ego wi..er. 4 von 5 Games nur Egoisten unterwegs. Keine pässe, sie denken sie können alles besser. Selbst als Torwart wird aufs Tor geschossen. etc. Ultra nervig. Spielt es wirklich nur mit freunden. 
3. Der gravierendste Punkt. Das absichtliche Spielen neben oder über das Tor erhöht die Tor Garantie enorm. Man erwartet coole Spielzüge, geile Tore aber in der Regel spielt der Stürmer den ball über das Tor und macht Ihn dann selber mit einem Kopfball rein. Es sollte noch ein kleiner bereich hinter dem Tor bestehen um diesen quatsch zu vermeiden. 

Für eine premade Gruppe die bisschen Spaß haben möchte ist das Spiel wirklich zu empfehlen. Für alle anderen wird es eher zu einem Frust fest. Und da die Punkte doch am ende dem Spielspaß zu sehr in der quere stehen, kann ich dieses Spiel derzeit nicht empfehlen.

The game is cool, but feels way too laggy and unpolished. The constant lag during close-quarter interactions with other players  makes it pretty much unplayable. If you're hoping to win ball disputes by anticipating other players' moves—forget it. The game completely ignores reaction time, and no matter how fast you react, your character will, invariably, move slower than that freaking sloth from Zootopia. It's all useless: your efforts are useless, your skill is useless. Even if you manage to dribble or pull off an impossible save as the goalkeeper, the game will lag and ignore your inputs.

It looks like a good game on the surface, but it's still pretty clunky.
Can't recommend it as of now. I'd wait at least a year or two, hopefully by then they’ll have actually fixed all that stuff.

UPDATE: / if you want to, skip to the ORIGINAL review below /
So a friend of mine proposed I should watch Blue Lock, and so I did.
Here's what I gathered - apparently you can't expect anything else than what I described, because:
-kids mostly know nothing about football, except videos of C.Ronaldo and Messi.
-they are also mostly selfish in nature in that age, and the game appeals to this age group, as well as older football fans, so they get mixed up.
-the master of the Blue Lock anime project, LITERALLY tells the players to be EGOIST and score goals, rather than pass, on multiple occasions, in fact that's the main theme of the anime.
-said concept of EGOISM is heavily romanticized in the anime, to the point where being called an egoist is an actual compliment.

Now, I gotta say, after hitting Gold rank and above, the matchmaking starts feeling a little better, and more often than not your teammates kind of try to play as a team, pass, defend, etc. But let's say that's 60-70% of the cases, while the remaining end up having trolls, or generally very bad/egoist players in them. So winning is hard in these games, and it sucks a lot of your energy to just bear with it, which is why I still won't be turning my review to 'positive', because of this idiotic matchmaking (or rather its absence?). Having said that, epic moments do exist - last night after quickly conceding 0-2 to the enemy, two troll kids started spamming emotes and left. The remaining 3 of us managed to equalize and get to 3-3 and 5+ minutes of overtime in a total of 10 minutes of playing 3v5, and nearly won on a couple occasions, but ultimately lost to what was pure exhaustion by overwhelming numbers.

ORIGINAL:
I mean... the game is great.

But it doesn't do well in one specific area.
Everybody wants to be Cristiano f**n Ronaldo.
The game doesn't enforce/reward playing in a specific position, so everyone wants to go to the enemy goal, and spam "TO MEE" emote, so they get a pass and score - which they fail 95% of the time, and you are the only one defending your goalie against an attack of 3+ players.
The community is TOXIC af - apart from everyone thinking they are the main character in Blue Lock, the moment you concede 1 goal, or lose the ball to a good enemy effort, everyone starts spamming "Good job" emotes. I once lost it when I was constantly saving goals, had like 9-10 saves, most of them done solo, since everyone is a Striker, and when I finally conceded a goal, lil 12 y old sh*ts started spamming Good Job.

TL:DR - Love the game, the playerbase however is toxic and sometimes making your experience insufferable.

Currently i'm in Platinum rank, and games there are to 90% the same: Enemies rush the goal corner and try to score headers because the detection of the game whether or not you are even allowed to intercept the ball even if it flies in your direction is not working properly. Or they try rush goals, which almost never work. The problem i have with all this is how the game cannot detect properly whether or not a goalkeeper can catch the ball even if they jump, slide or move in the exact spot where the ball is going. Stuff like this is causing so many unfair goals on both sides, questioning the validity of a Ranked mode when the game isn't working properly in 99% of the time.

I don't know how many fixes it needs for Sloclap to address these things, but the game is out for 3 months. A lot of actual broken stuff got fixed. But even to this day, i see people floating in mid-air or being unable to cancel a matchmaking queue.

Until they can't fix this, i can't say that you should get this game. End of story.

Depois de 100 horas de jogo e várias partidas no rank Mestre (penultimo rank do jogo) creio que finalmente posso vir aqui e dar minha opinião em relação ao jogo.

[h2] Rematch é um jogo com uma ideia incrível, porém executada de maneira extremamente pobre e existem vários motivos para isso estar dessa forma, vamos por partes: [/h2]

- Gameplay do jogo é muito precária como goleiro, muitos gols são tomados por conta de problemas de interação entre o atacante, a bola e o goleiro em bolas altas, o que faz com que você dê de ponta no chão ao invés de pular na bola, um problema que é amplamente discutido no discord oficial do jogo.

- O "meta" do jogo torna ele muito maçante: Você pega a bola como goleiro, toca no meio campo e o meio campo cruza a bola pra área, o atacante da um voleio e faz o gol. Isso funciona EM TODOS os níveis de ranqueada. O youtuber DRK tem um vídeo explicando muito bem sobre isso.

- Voleio é extremamente roubado por conta do sistema esquisito de prioridade desse jogo. Você pula 3 metros de altura pra dar voleio (dados do próprio post do jogo no site deles), você ganha mais prioridade por usar esforço extra e você pula tão alto quanto alguém cabeceando a bola ou quanto um goleiro tentando pular na bola COM AS MÃOS.

- O matchmaking do jogo é inexistente. Você pode ser diamante, mestre e elite e você ainda vai cair com pessoas de ranks baixos, como prata e ouro. Então como um jogador solo ou duo, há partidas em que você vai cair contra um squad completo e vai tomar 4x0 em 1 minuto. Ou até mesmo contra outras pessoas solo de ranks mais altos e o mesmo acontece. E o mesmo pode acontecer no seu lado, você pode cair com 4 elites no time e o outro lado ser um time de ouros. 

- O jogo não tem sistema de report no jogo online competitivo com chat de voz deles. Isso é um erro absurdo, por mais que seja o primeiro jogo online da sloclap. É inaceitável você ter um jogo online com chat de voz e não conseguir reportar as pessoas diretamente pelo jogo ou mutar elas. E as pessoas falam coisas terríveis no chat de voz. Sabe o que você precisa fazer para reportar elas? Gravar o jogo e mandar em um chat do discord deles. Pois é. 

- As interações com a bola não fazem sentido algum, e isso acontece com certa frequência: Você pode estar na frente de um atacante, cabecear a bola no mesmo momento que ele, a bola pode espirrar pro lado dele e você ganhar ponto de interceptação - o que significa que você bateu na bola - Mas o jogo decide (ou o universo decide) pra que lado a bola vai.
A bola também vai na sua direção às vezes e bate em você, mas passa reto por ti, com minimo desvio. Parece que o hitbox do seu boneco é um palito, ou um triangulo de pinball que faz a bola espirrar para os lados ao invés de bater em você e voltar na direção que veio ou ser amortecida no processo.

- e por fim, o domínio de bola do jogo (A no controle) mais atrapalha do que ajuda, por não ser o domínio de bola padrão. Teu personagem da um toque na direção que você tá olhando ou pressionando o direcional, isso faz com que MUITAS VEZES você "domine" a bola para um lado e ela sobre para um adversário. É ridículo e é ruim.


[h3] No geral, Rematch, como eu disse, tem uma ideia muito boa e eu gosto do jogo apesar de todos esses problemas. Mas eu não consigo recomendar ele para pessoas que querem jogar algo competitivo sem ter um grupo ou sem se estressar com a quantidade de interações bizarras que existem dentro desse jogo. 

Na minha opinião ele deveria ter entrado em early access ou sofrido delay para que as mecânicas do jogo fossem polidas e eles pudessem entregar um produto, de fato, finalizado. [/h3]

ABER: zwei Kritikpunkte

1. Die Steuerung nicht individuell anpassen zu können ist einfach schlecht.
Das muss dringend möglich gemacht werden, sonst brech ich mir mit meinen Gichtfingern jedes Gelenk der Hand für ein paar der Moves.

2. Einen Offline Bot Modus zum Üben. 
Ja es gibt das Tutorial in dem alles ein mal gezeigt wird und man kann es so oft nachholen wie man möchte. Es zeigt einem ein mal alles, aber einen Modus zum Üben mit Bot Gegner wäre schon gut. 
Denn im Multiplayer hat man alleine sonst schnell das Problem nie den ball zu bekommen, einfach weil die anderen sehen, das man anfängt und schlecht ist. Natürlich liegt das auch an viel Egoismus, aber man hat keine Möglichkeit zu Üben, Außer das Tutorial, die Zeit-Herausforderungen und danach online.

Ich hoffe die Sachen werden noch hinzugefügt. Dann wird Rocket League ausgedient haben und ich kann mich voll und ganz an Rematch erfreuen.

[h1] Rematch – A Fresh Take on Arcade Football (7.5/10) [/h1]

I’ve been playing Rematch for about 60+hrs now(including both BETAs), and while it’s not perfect, it’s one of the more interesting football games I’ve played in a while.

This isn’t your typical FIFA or eFootball clone. It’s 5v5, arcade-style, no fouls, no offsides, and the ball never goes out of play. It’s fast, chaotic, and completely skill-based. Every pass, shot, and tackle has to be manually timed—there’s no auto-assist or RNG to lean on. You win because you played better, not because you unlocked some overpowered stat boost.

[b] What I Like: [/b]
Skill matters. No pay-to-win, no player upgrades—just raw mechanics. The controls take some time to master, but once it clicks, it’s super satisfying.

Matches are quick. Six minutes max, and you can mercy-rule a team if you go up by four goals. Great for short sessions.

Feels fair. Everyone starts on equal ground. It's refreshing to play a football game where cosmetics don’t affect gameplay.

Huge launch. Over 3 million players joined in the first few weeks. So it’s easy to find matches—for now.

[b] What Needs Work: [/b]
No solo/offline mode yet. This is a big one. You have to play online, and if you're queuing solo, your experience may vary depending on teammates.

Server issues. I’ve had a few desyncs and occasional lag. Not game-breaking, but noticeable.

Cosmetic prices are steep. A single outfit can run you around $8. Not pay-to-win, but still a bit much when the base game already costs $20–$25.

Not a ton of depth yet. Modes are limited to competitive and casual matches. No tournaments, no leagues, no AI matches. Devs say more is coming in 2026, including offline play.

[b] Final Thoughts: [/b]
Rematch is clearly built for people who want a competitive, no-BS football experience without the gimmicks. It’s not trying to be a realistic sim—it’s more like if Rocket League and FIFA Street had a baby, but without the cars or crazy tricks.

If you’ve got friends to play with or just want a game where skill actually matters, Rematch is a solid pickup. Just know it’s still growing. There's real potential here, and if the devs keep building on it, I could see it becoming a staple in the arcade sports genre.

[h3][i] Worth playing now, and worth watching long-term. [/i][/h3]

[h1] Хорошая идея - ужасная реализация [/h1]

Спустя 100ч в игре могу сделать некоторые выводы:
[h2] Плюсы: [/h2]
[h3] 1. Геймплей [/h3] - захватывающий геймплей, пасы в касание, красивые голы, некоторые матчи бывают настолько красивые и интересные что сам смотришь и кайфуешь от игры.
[h3] 2. Механики [/h3] - куча интересных и сложных механик, которые требуют практики для реализации. Bladeshot, ippy slide, Golden boost и тд.
[h3] 3. Кастомизация [/h3] - редактирование персонажа в игре достойное, куча шмоток и разных приколов. Есть из чего выбрать. 

[h2] Минусы: [/h2]
[h3] 1. Пинг/Сервера [/h3] - пинга ниже 60мс вы врятли увидите. Пинг слишком сильно влияет на игровой экспириенс. Банально отбор мяча невозможен если соперник из Европы и у него пинг 10, тебе нужно рассчитывать на это всегда и отбирать мяч с упреждением. Частенько вы будете проезжать на подкате через мяч и удивляться как соперник смог пробить через вас. Также отбор в воздухе будет у вас получаться 1 из 5 раз.
[h3] 2. Геймпад/КлаваМышь [/h3] - игра не сделана под клавумышь, пас работает криво. 3 из 4 варианта удара по мячу будут работать через одно место. Эта проблема также портит впечатления об игре.
[h3] 3. Рейтинговый подбор [/h3] - Я не знаю каким образом работает подбор игроков. В один день я мог играть 5 часов подряд и не выиграть ни разу. Даже по теории вероятности я должен был выиграть хоть раз. Так же допускаю вероятность [i] Скрытого пула [/i] в подборе игроков. Рекомендую играть только в пати с друзьями.
[h3] 4. Игроки [/h3] - игроки ниже мастера или платины будут EGOистами и паса от них вы не увидите. Я понимаю что эта проблема не игры, а комъюнити, но всеже, это тоже портит впечатления.
[h3] 5. Баги [/h3] - В игре достаточно багов. Телепорт мяча, телепорт игроков, рассинхрон сервера с клиентом.
[h3] 6. Вылеты [/h3] - Игра раз в час будет вылетать, хотите вы того или нет. Возможно это только у игроков с России, но все-же.

Итог на данный момент - Если вы давно хотели попробовать футбольный симулятор, эта игра вполне неплохо передает атмосферу реального футбола. Однако сейчас не советую играть в эту игру. Ценник завышен и реализация оставляет желать лучшего. Лучше подождать пока пофиксят баги, вылеты, пасы, сервера и тд. Если и играть то только в пачке с друзьями, иначе разочаруетесь.

🟥 RESEÑA NEGATIVA
💸 Precio pagado: $15 USD
⏱️ Horas jugadas: 12
📅 Fecha de reseña: 11 de julio de 2025

★★★☆☆ – Mucho potencial, pero muy verde para su precio

“Mucho potencial... pero completamente desaprovechado”
Compré Rematch con la ilusión de encontrar un juego de fútbol arcade divertido y competitivo. Lo que encontré fue una experiencia frustrante, mal optimizada y con una comunidad que arruina cualquier intento de disfrutarlo.

⚠️ LO MALO:
Emparejamiento roto: Te mete en partidas con jugadores de niveles totalmente disparejos. No hay equilibrio ni lógica.

Servidores inestables: Lag constante, desconexiones, y partidas que se caen sin motivo. ¿Dónde está la infraestructura?

Jugadores sin cooperación: El juego depende del trabajo en equipo, pero la mayoría juega como si fuera un shooter. No pasan, no defienden, y abandonan si van perdiendo.

Contenido escaso y sin pulir: Por $15 dólares, esperaba algo más completo. Esto parece una beta disfrazada de juego final.

✅ LO BUENO (si hay que rescatar algo):
Buena idea de base.

Estilo visual atractivo.

Mecánicas con potencial... si algún día las terminan.

📝 Conclusión: Rematch podría ser un gran juego, pero hoy por hoy es una decepción. Si te interesa, esperá a que lo mejoren o a que esté en oferta. No vale lo que cuesta.

The game has a fun concept but is currently held back by technical issues and some gameplay design choices. Until these get addressed, especially for competitive/ranked play, it’s hard to recommend.

Technical Issues:

Game is glitchy and has severe connectivity issues. Every few matches, you can't lock onto or interact with the ball at all and the only fix is to restart the entire game. OR you have to deal with players constantly teleporting to the ball, which makes the first-touch interactions feel laggy and unfair.

Gameplay Issues:

Getting tackled from behind leaves you stunned, out of stamina, and out of the play. In comparison, games like Rocket League give you boost and protective respawn after being demoed. Here, you’re just punished with no recovery options. If this game is supposed to be "arcade-style," there should be some sort of counterplay to getting tackled from behind. Honestly, right now a lot of mechanics just feel cheap and one-sided.

Overall:

Fun concept but bugs and balance kills the experience, especially in ranked. Maybe i'll revisit after a major update but i'm not confident this game will get the fixes it deserves.

Purchase? maybe, Game pass? yes. In another year, this game could be truly amazing.

Outside of the Battle pass, there is no "in game" earn-able items. they have 19 locked titles in the game. So far 3 have been in purchasable bundles. At 2 weeks a piece that's almost 38 weeks of already secured bundles and deals but no base game earn-able titles / items. It feels like an Early Access Title; you can’t even change your key binds or inputs in game now for a "full release".

The game is a ton of fun with my friends just laughing and messing around. If we don't have 3 of us on at minimum there's no reason to play. Between the 5v5 only ranked mode, time gated battle pass, no in game items, titles, cosmetics, or cool stats to work towards we have zero point in playing just 2 of us or solo. Once you've reached the end of the battle pass for the time gate you’re stuck and just earning credits to save up for when it unlocks in 2-4 weeks. Every win and loss literally effects nothing else. If we were better, we might enjoy ranked, but I hold out hopes that 1. they will even give out ranked rewards and 2. They don't give out 1 item per class item "here is your bronze, Gold and Plat earrings" and it’s just a small gold ball in your ear that you can’t see.

Game play: this game and rocket league are competing for the most ghost hits in a match. we spent more time saying "How?", "What?", "they didn't catch that", "It went through you", "That was in the net”, “the ball teleported" then anything else. 4 of us watched my character, as the goalie, dive for a ball and save it, then instantly drop the ball mid jump and stand up as the ball scored. Truly Magical. 

Complaining aside, when the Dev's do update the game (i.e. severs, ranked modes, casual modes, tournaments...), this could be something truly special. Right now, it’s incredibly bare bones. Great Game-pass game for sure! But it's hard to justify a $30 price tag just to play casual and 1 ranked game mode.

Edit: 
As of Patch 3 
•	Well, they did add ranked rewards. But only if you’re in the top Half of the ranks Platinum and above. If your Below Platinum i.e. Bronze, Silver or Gold you don’t get anything. Thanks for playing but you just weren’t “dedicated” enough. 
•	They added 5 extra items at the end of the battle pass that will cost you an additional 365 levels or about 230 hours of play time if the 1 token per level is a constant. This is also only for the “most dedicated of you” per the developer’s words not mine. 
•	I have not played the game recently but they do talk about nerfing core Meta mechanics so this may be good or bad for the player base, but I can’t weigh in on this. 
•	They also added more KBM settings and changes and a colorblind mode, I really like this change!!!
•	There was some good and some bad through these updates and I still stand by what I said, in a year this game could be amazing.
•	Last two points:
o	1: I like how they still have priority issues such as adding items to the in-game shop but literally zero effort in checking these items. In the shop currently as of September 8th there is an item called “nimbus”……that’s it. No idea what it is. No identifier of what it is. I had to buy it and go hunting for it to find out it’s a tattoo! Super cool design and I like it but really? No one thought to name it “tattoo” or even just say “right arm” in the descriptor? This is just a small example of their eagerness to add things to the game, but it never feels finished. 
o	2: I love that they hid the titles in the customization area. Prior to me checking and to I assume the addition of this new “earn-able” title for the “dedicated” players, there was 19 “locked” titles that no one knew how to get. We assumed we could earn them only to realize after the second licensed bundle that “oh….you have to buy them”. Now if you go check they hid all those titles away. My theory is that we were not supposed to know about these titles on the front end they hid them away. But I’d also like to think that it was initially done on purpose to drive players into the cash shop to buy the bundle when they saw titles they liked. Maybe it didn’t financially work out like they thought it would? Either way it made me chuckle when I checked. 
•	From recent reviews, the player base seems divided. Youtubers seem excited about any update this game puts out, which is good for its longevity. But as it stands, the game is in the same state as it was released. bugs exist, players exploit them, dev's remove them, cash shop has bundles, battle pass time gated, no knew ranked modes, causal is the same, and that’s about it. I’ll check back in 6 months and see where the game stands.

Do not buy this game and expect to have a smooth experience. 
This game has lots of potential. But it's all wasted. It's unbelievable that a company can do several play tests before full release and still not realize that they are under-investing in the stability of the game. Oh you're goalie? You dove for the ball as it's coming towards your goal? No you didn't, because server said you didn't. 

You can be like me and have overkill internet, speeds of 1,000d/50u, Ethernet connection, playing the servers in your region (I'm Eastern US), and still have an incredibly laggy experience. We're talking 100 ping, rubber band lagging, the whole 9 yards. 

This game has been out for a month. After several play tests, if they can get data the number of goals scored by all players and flaunt about it on X, they should be able to deduce that the servers performance are below bare minimum for a playable experience.

This is a sports game. Reaction times on behalf of the player AND the server are of utmost importance. You can't host a fast paced game on cheap servers just so Senior Devs and Directors can get an extra chunk of money in bonuses. Invest in your game. 

This makes Rocket League's servers look good.

Vamos lá:
🇧🇷:
Comprei o jogo na pré-venda, edição mais cara, porque confiava (ênfase nisso) na Sloclap porque Sifu é um jogo perfeito. O que eu recebi? Decepção, REMATCH no primeiro Beta estava ótimo, pouquíssimos problemas e os que tinham não impactavam em nada, no máximo um lag rápido aqui ou ali. No segundo Beta, tudo piorou 500%:
- O goleiro agarra a bola, mas ela sai da mão dele e entra no gol do nada;
- Ao entrar em uma partida, as vezes seus comandos simplesmente NÃO FUNCIONAM, nem pausar você consegue, forçando a dar Alt F4;
- Aleatoriamente, ao pegar a posse da bola, ela simplesmente CONGELA no chão, mas se você perder a posse, ela só volta ao normal, dando um golpe de vista ridículo.

Até aí estava ok, era um Beta, aí o jogo lançou. Quantos desses problemas foram resolvidos? NENHUM! Todos eles ainda estão no jogo depois de quase 1 mês de lançamento, e nesse meio tempo que poderiam ter consertado todos esses e outros problemas o que a empresa fez? Lançou skins, parcerias com jogadores reais (Ronaldinho, Ter Stegen e Mainoo) e parcerias com Balenciaga e Puma. No X (Twitter), só dão explicações rasas e sem um pingo de transparência dizendo que estão sabendo dos problemas e que vão corrigir, mas vão mesmo?

No geral, até 10/07/2025, REMATCH está praticamente INJOGÁVEL, totalmente quebrado e cheio de problemas dos quais a empresa não parece querer resolver, ou seja, definitivamente NÃO RECOMENDO.

🇺🇸:
I pre-ordered the game, the most expensive edition, because I trusted (emphasis on that) Sloclap because Sifu is a perfect game. What did I get? Disappointment. REMATCH in the first Beta was great, with very few issues, and those that did exist didn't impact anything, at most a brief lag here and there. In the second Beta, everything got 500% worse:
- The goalkeeper grabs the ball, but it leaves his hand and goes into the goal out of nowhere;
- When entering a match, sometimes your controls simply DON'T WORK; you can't even pause, forcing you to press Alt+F4;
- Randomly, when you gain possession of the ball, it simply FREEZES on the ground, but if you lose possession, it just returns to normal, causing a ridiculous glance.

Up until that point, it was fine; it was a Beta, and then the game was released. How many of these issues were fixed? NONE! All of them are still in the game after almost a month of release, and in the meantime, what could they have fixed all these and other issues? What has the company done? They've released skins, partnerships with real players (Ronaldinho, Ter Stegen, and Mainoo), and partnerships with Balenciaga and Puma. On Twitter, they only give shallow explanations without a shred of transparency, saying they're aware of the problems and will fix them, but will they really?

Overall, as of July 10, 2025, REMATCH is practically UNPLAYABLE, completely broken, and riddled with issues that the company seems unwilling to address. In other words, I definitely DO NOT RECOMMEND IT.

🇪🇸:
Reservé el juego, la edición más cara, porque confiaba (y lo enfatizo) en Sloclap, ya que Sifu es un juego perfecto. ¿Qué me llevé? Decepción. REMATCH en la primera beta fue genial, con muy pocos problemas, y los que había no afectaban en nada, como mucho un breve lag ocasional. En la segunda beta, todo empeoró un 500 %:
- El portero agarra el balón, pero se le escapa de la mano y entra en la portería de repente;
- Al entrar en un partido, a veces los controles simplemente NO FUNCIONAN; ni siquiera puedes pausar el juego, lo que te obliga a presionar Alt+F4;
- De vez en cuando, al ganar la posesión del balón, este simplemente se CONGELA en el suelo, pero si lo pierdes, vuelve a la normalidad, causando un aspecto ridículo.

Hasta ese momento, iba bien; era una beta, y luego se lanzó el juego. ¿Cuántos de estos problemas se solucionaron? ¡Ninguno! Todos siguen en el juego después de casi un mes de su lanzamiento, y mientras tanto, ¿qué podrían haber solucionado estos y otros problemas? ¿Qué ha hecho la compañía? Han lanzado aspectos, colaboraciones con jugadores reales (Ronaldinho, Ter Stegen y Mainoo) y colaboraciones con Balenciaga y Puma. En Twitter, solo dan explicaciones superficiales y sin la menor transparencia, diciendo que conocen los problemas y que los solucionarán, pero ¿realmente lo harán?

En resumen, a partir del 10 de julio de 2025, REMATCH es prácticamente injugable, está completamente roto y plagado de problemas que la compañía parece no estar dispuesta a abordar. En otras palabras, definitivamente NO LO RECOMIENDO.

Game is fun, but only when it works, which is not always the case. Inconsistent is the best word I would use to describe Rematch, which is pretty bad considering it's a fast paced competitive game where split second reflexes and decisions are needed. 

The game released on PC with dismal keyboard and mouse controls that are plain broken at the time of this review. Precise passing and lobbing, for example, is near impossible. The slightest flick of the mouse will send the shot to an extreme 90 degree angle, not even close to where you need it. The developers know that it's an issue, but still have not fixed it in almost a month and counting.

The netcode is also extremely questionable, with countless clips already out there of people getting robbed by latency and poor servers. I myself have had perfect saves as a goalkeeper only to have the ball literally ripped out of my hands the next second and scored solely by ping, which funnily enough the replay also shows. Client and server side desync is huge and you'll see it more often than you should.

Not to mention that I've already seen three gameplay exploits so far that people can use in the field, only one of which has been patched so far. This, along with the other issues above, makes this game an inconsistent mess so far.

However, I'm sure the developers are proud that their microtransactions and battle pass store are working perfectly fine and without a hitch. They've already released another bundle several days ago instead of actually fixing the game in a timely manner.

Игра REMATCH приятно удивила! Несмотря на минималистичный стиль, в ней ощущается продуманный геймдизайн и внимание к деталям. Битвы захватывающие, требуют тактики и внимательности — каждая ошибка может стоить победы.

Геймплей держит в напряжении, особенно в PvP — каждый матч как шахматная партия на стероидах. Управление интуитивное, но освоить все нюансы сложно — и это круто.

Понравилась идея с быстрыми раундами: не успеваешь устать, хочется сыграть "ещё одну катку", а потом уже полночь. Разработчики молодцы, чувствуется любовь к своему проекту.

Надеюсь, игра продолжит развиваться — у неё отличный потенциал для киберспортивной сцены и активного сообщества.

Итог: 9/10 — рекомендую всем, кто ищет свежие ощущения и соревновательный азарт!

P.S: его футболистам, зайдёт особенно.
